reviews.title: Rust
reviews.mini_review_it: Survival hardcore in multiplayer. Costruisci, sopravvivi e difenditi contro altri giocatori in un mondo aperto brutalmente competitivo.
reviews.mini_review_en: Hardcore multiplayer survival. Build, survive, and defend against other players in a brutally competitive open world.

reviews.title: HELLDIVERS 2
reviews.mini_review_it: Sparatutto cooperativo tattico ad alta intensità. Lavoro di squadra essenziale per affrontare orde di nemici alieni.
reviews.mini_review_en: High-intensity tactical co-op shooter. Teamwork essential to face waves of alien enemies.

reviews.title: Tom Clancy's Rainbow Six Siege
reviews.mini_review_it: FPS tattico con distruzione ambientale. Mappe verticali e strategi precise rendono ogni round un puzzle.
reviews.mini_review_en: Tactical FPS with environmental destruction. Vertical maps and precise strategies make each round a puzzle.

reviews.title: Dead by Daylight
reviews.mini_review_it: Asimmetrico survival horror 4v1. Un killer contro quattro sopravvissuti in partite tensive e imprevedibili.
reviews.mini_review_en: Asymmetric 4v1 survival horror. One killer vs four survivors in tense, unpredictable matches.

reviews.title: Team Fortress 2
reviews.mini_review_it: Classico shooter multiplayer con classi uniche. Competitivo e divertente dopo oltre 15 anni.
reviews.mini_review_en: Classic multiplayer shooter with unique classes. Competitive and fun after 15+ years.

reviews.title: Grand Theft Auto V Enhanced
reviews.mini_review_it: Open world sandbox con modalità online ricca. Heist cooperativi e missioniPvP endless.
reviews.mini_review_en: Open world sandbox with rich online mode. Co-op heists and endless PvP missions.

reviews.title: DayZ
reviews.mini_review_it: Survival horror realista in multiplayer. Fame, sete, malattie: sopravvivere è un'esperienza dura.
reviews.mini_review_en: Realistic multiplayer survival horror. Hunger, thirst, diseases: survival is a harsh experience.

reviews.title: Warframe
reviews.mini_review_it: Action shooter free-to-play sci-fi. Movimento fluido, grind infinito ma divertente.
reviews.mini_review_en: Free-to-play sci-fi action shooter. Fluid movement, infinite but fun grind.

reviews.title: R.E.P.O.
reviews.mini_review_it: Horror coop physics-based. Raccogli oggetti pesanti con fisica realistica in compagnia.
reviews.mini_review_en: Physics-based coop horror. Collect heavy objects with realistic physics together.

reviews.title: Don't Starve Together
reviews.mini_review_it: Survival crafting indie. Gestisci risorse e sopravvivi in mondi generati proceduralmente.
reviews.mini_review_en: Indie crafting survival. Manage resources and survive in procedurally generated worlds.

reviews.title: PAYDAY 2
reviews.mini_review_it: Furti cooperativi in stile heist. Pianifica, esegui e domina con la tua banda.
reviews.mini_review_en: Co-op heist-style robberies. Plan, execute, and dominate with your crew.

reviews.title: Left 4 Dead 2
reviews.mini_review_it: Classico zombie shooter arcade. Campagna iconica e versus mode ancora divertenti dopo anni.
reviews.mini_review_en: Classic zombie arcade shooter. Iconic campaign and versus mode still fun after years.

reviews.title: Destiny 2
reviews.mini_review_it: FPS MMO looter shooter. Campagna, raid e PvP in un universo sci-fi epico.
reviews.mini_review_en: MMO looter shooter FPS. Campaigns, raids and PvP in an epic sci-fi universe.

reviews.title: Terraria
reviews.mini_review_it: Sandbox 2D survival crafting. Esplora, costruisci e combatti in un mondo pixel art vasto.
reviews.mini_review_en: 2D sandbox survival crafting. Explore, build and fight in a vast pixel art world.

reviews.title: Project Zomboid
reviews.mini_review_it: Survival zombie hardcore. Gestione risorse realism e permadeath in un mondo post-apocalittico.
reviews.mini_review_en: Hardcore zombie survival. Realistic resource management and permadeath in a post-apocalyptic world.

reviews.title: ARK: Survival Evolved
reviews.mini_review_it: Survival con dinosauri. Adds, base building e creature da domare in multiplayer.
reviews.mini_review_en: Dinosaur survival. Tame creatures and build bases in multiplayer.

reviews.title: Rocket League
reviews.mini_review_it: Auto calcetto competitivo. Fisica esagerata e match rapidi perfetti per gaming serale.
reviews.mini_review_en: Competitive car soccer. Exaggerated physics and quick matches perfect for evening gaming.

reviews.title: Garry's Mod
reviews.mini_review_it: Sandbox fisica creativity. Lua scripting e mod illimitati per creatività senza fine.
reviews.mini_review_en: Physics sandbox creativity. Lua scripting and unlimited mods for endless creativity.

reviews.title: Palworld
reviews.mini_review_it: Creature catching survival. Combina allevamento, crafting e combattimento in mondo aperto.
reviews.mini_review_en: Creature catching survival. Combine breeding, crafting and combat in open world.

reviews.title: 7 Days to Die
reviews.mini_review_it: Survival horror sandbox. Costruisci, difendi sopravvivi zombie che attaccano ogni 7 giorni.
reviews.mini_review_en: Sandbox survival horror. Build, defend, survive zombies that attack every 7 days.
